ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.summary: LeRobot: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for Real-World Robotics in PyTorch
LeRobot: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for Real-World Robotics in PyTorch

name: lerobot
raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  version: 0.4.4
  build_number: 0
  disk_space_debug_cmd: python -c "import os, shutil; total, used, free = shutil.disk_usage(os.getcwd()); gib = 1024**3; print(f'[disk] cwd={os.getcwd()} free={free/gib:.2f} GiB used={used/gib:.2f} GiB total={total/gib:.2f} GiB')"
  # These are a subset of the tests that are representative of the different submodules of lerobot
  # and that are not too heavy to run in package creation phase
  representative_tests: tests/configs/test_plugin_loading.py tests/scripts/test_edit_dataset_parsing.py tests/utils/test_random_utils.py tests/transport/test_transport_utils.py tests/utils/test_io_utils.py tests/utils/test_encoding_utils.py tests/optim/test_schedulers.py

recipe:
  name: lerobot-split
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
- url: https://github.com/huggingface/lerobot/archive/refs/tags/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 7d98acd389db309b650585ccd95dda31789b81c4bbaa1955c1d91578a91d2522
  patches:
    - drop_cmake_pypi_dep.patch

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}
  noarch: python

outputs:
  - package:
      name: lerobot
    build:
      script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install .
      python:
        entry_points:
        - lerobot-calibrate = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_calibrate:main
        - lerobot-find-cameras = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_find_cameras:main
        - lerobot-find-port = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_find_port:main
        - lerobot-record = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_record:main
        - lerobot-replay = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_replay:main
        - lerobot-setup-motors = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_setup_motors:main
        - lerobot-teleoperate = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_teleoperate:main
        - lerobot-eval = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_eval:main
        - lerobot-train = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_train:main
        - lerobot-train-tokenizer = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_train_tokenizer:main
        - lerobot-dataset-viz = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_dataset_viz:main
        - lerobot-info = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_info:main
        - lerobot-find-joint-limits = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_find_joint_limits:main
        - lerobot-imgtransform-viz = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_imgtransform_viz:main
        - lerobot-edit-dataset = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_edit_dataset:main
        - lerobot-setup-can = lerobot.scripts.lerobot_setup_can:main
    
    requirements:
      host:
      - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      - setuptools
      - pip
      run:
      - python >=${{ python_min }}
      - datasets >=4.0.0,<5.0.0
      - diffusers >=0.27.2,<0.36.0
      - huggingface_hub >=0.34.2,<0.36.0
      # This is from https://github.com/huggingface/huggingface_hub/blob/v0.34.3/setup.py#L47.
      # huggingface-hub[hf-transfer]
      - hf-transfer >=0.1.4
      # huggingface-hub[cli]
      - inquirerpy ==0.3.4
      - accelerate >=1.10.0,<2.0.0
      - setuptools >=71.0.0,<81.0.0
      - cmake >=3.29.0.1,<4.2.0
      - einops >=0.8.0,<0.9.0
      - py-opencv >=4.9.0,<4.13.0
      - av >=15.0.0,<16.0.0
      - jsonlines >=4.0.0,<5.0.0
      - packaging >=24.2,<26.0
      - pynput >=1.7.7,<1.9.0
      - pyserial >=3.5,<4.0
      - wandb >=0.24.0,<0.25.0
      - draccus ==0.10.0
      - gymnasium >=1.1.1,<2.0.0
      - rerun-sdk >=0.24.0,<0.27.0
      - deepdiff >=7.0.1,<9.0.0
      - imageio >=2.34.0,<3.0.0
      - imageio-ffmpeg
      - termcolor >=2.4.0,<4.0.0
      - pytorch >=2.2.1,<2.11.0
      # torchvision and torchcodec are strictly bound in PyPI metadata
      # as they are ABI constrained but this is not reflected in their PyPI
      # metadata, but as in conda-forge this ABI constraint is reflected,
      # we can relax the version constraints here 
      - torchvision >=0.21.0
      - torchcodec >=0.2.1

    
    tests:
    - python:
        imports:
        - lerobot
        pip_check: true
        python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
    - script:
      - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}

  # In the following, all the Python extra dependencies like 
  # lerobot[pygame-dep] are modeled by separate lerobot-pygame-dep output
  # 
  # Almost all the extra in the lerobot package are packaged as lerobot-* 
  # outputs in this recipe, with the exception of:
  # - dev, test and video_benchmark: as they are listed as "dev" extras
  # - reachy: as reachy2-sdk is not available on conda-forge
  # - pi: as it depends on branch of transfomers, and it is not included in lerobot[all]
  # - libero: as the hf-libero dependency is not available on conda-forge
  # - metaworld: as the metaworld dependency is not available on conda-forge
  # - groot: as it is not clear which flash-attn and decord dependencies 
  #          are actually there, and it is not included in lerobot[all]
  # - phone: as telop and hebi-py are not in conda-forge
  # - wallx: as it is not included in lerobot[all] 
  # - sarm: as it requires qwen-vl-utils that is not in conda-forge
  # - hilserl: as it requires gym-hil that is not in conda-forge
  - package:
      name: lerobot-all
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-dynamixel', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-gamepad', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-hopejr', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-lekiwi', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-kinematics', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-intelrealsense', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-smolvla', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-xvla', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-async', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-peft', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-aloha', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-pusht', exact=True) }}

    tests:
    - python:
        imports:
        - lerobot
        pip_check: false
        python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
    - script:
      - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}


  # The tests files are non-neglibile in size, so we put them in a separate package
  - package:
      name: lerobot-tests
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-all', exact=True) }}

    tests:
      - python:
          pip_check: false
          imports:
            - lerobot
      - files:
          source:
            - tests/**
        requirements:
          run:
            - pytest
        script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - if: linux
            then: export MUJOCO_GL="egl"
          # Workaround for https://github.com/conda-forge/gymnasium-feedstock/pull/50#issuecomment-3218125344
          - if: aarch64
            then: export LD_PRELOAD=libGLdispatch.so.0
          # Ensure that pygame tests pass on unix,
          # see https://github.com/conda-forge/gymnasium-feedstock/pull/36#issuecomment-2124699477
          - if: unix
            then: export SDL_VIDEODRIVER="dummy"
          - if: unix
            then: pytest -v ${{ representative_tests }}
          - if: win
            then: pytest -v ${{ representative_tests }}

  - package:
      name: lerobot-pygame-dep
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - pygame >=2.5.1,<2.7.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-placo-dep
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - placo >=0.9.6,<0.10.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-transformers-dep
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - transformers >=4.57.1,<5.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-grpcio-dep
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - grpcio 1.73.1.*
        - protobuf >=6.31.1,<6.32.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-can-dep
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - python-can >=4.2.0,<5.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-feetech
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ftservo-python-sdk
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-dynamixel
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - dynamixel-sdk >=3.7.31,<3.9.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-damiao
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-can-dep', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-robstride
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-can-dep', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-openarms
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-damiao', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-gamepad
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-pygame-dep', exact=True) }}
        - hidapi >=0.14.0,<0.15.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-hopejr
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-feetech', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-pygame-dep', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-lekiwi
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-feetech', exact=True) }}
        - pyzmq >=26.2.1,<28.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-kinematics
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-placo-dep', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-intelrealsense
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        # We do not include the upper bound as conda-forge includes
        # librealse 2.57 that is not include in pypi
        - pyrealsense2 >=2.55.1
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-unitree-g1
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - pyzmq >=26.2.1,<28.0.0
        - onnxruntime >=1.16.0,<2.0.0
        - pinocchio-python >=3.0.0,<4.0.0
        - meshcat-python >=0.3.0,<0.4.0
        - matplotlib-base >=3.9.0,<4.0.0
        - casadi >=3.6.0,<4.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-xvla
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-transformers-dep', exact=True) }}
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-smolvla
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-transformers-dep', exact=True) }}
        - num2words >=0.5.14,<0.6.0
        - accelerate >=1.7.0,<2.0.0
        - safetensors >=0.4.3,<1.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-async
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-grpcio-dep', exact=True) }}
        - matplotlib-base >=3.10.3,<4.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-aloha
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - gym-aloha >=0.1.2,<0.2.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-pusht
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - gym-pusht >=0.1.5,<0.2.0
        - pymunk >=6.6.0,<7.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

  - package:
      name: lerobot-peft
    requirements:
      host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
      run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot', exact=True) }}
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('lerobot-transformers-dep', exact=True) }}
        - peft >=0.18.0,<1.0.0
    tests:
      - script:
          - ${{ disk_space_debug_cmd }}
          - echo "tested in lerobot-tests"

about:
  homepage: https://github.com/huggingface/lerobot
  summary: 'LeRobot: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for Real-World Robotics in PyTorch'
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file:
    - LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - traversaro
  feedstock-name: lerobot
